title: mRNA Graduated From COVID. Cancer Vaccines and Autoimmune Therapies Are Next.
description: mRNA technology didn't just survive the pandemic — it graduated. Personalized cancer vaccines are cutting melanoma recurrence risk by 49% and generating T cells that persist for nearly four years in one of medicine's deadliest cancers. Now the same platform is being run in reverse: engineering immune tolerance to treat MS, rheumatoid arthritis, and lupus without suppressing the entire immune system. The science is extraordinary. The political threats to it are real.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Same Technology That Fought COVID Is Now Being Reprogrammed to Fight Cancer — and Teach Your Immune System to Stop Attacking You
